reasoning: Gukesh D's FIDE rating on the Wikipedia page as of October 2025 (and specifically 2025-10-26) is 2752, after sliding over the past year. For the resolution to be True, his rating must increase by at least 1% (meaning it must reach approximately 2780 or higher). On November 1, the FIDE rating will be updated to reflect his October classical games. Searching reveals he lost 5.8 points in the Chess Bundesliga in October, meaning his November rating will actually decrease to ~2746. Since FIDE ratings only update monthly and Wikipedia relies on the official FIDE list, the Nov 2 and Nov 25 resolution dates will most likely show 2746 (or, if delayed, 2752). Neither is 1% higher than 2752. For January 24, 2026, he would need to gain ~34 rating points by the Jan 1 2026 official list. Such a massive rating jump in two months is extremely rare at the ~2750+ level and highly unlikely given his recent slump, placing the probability extremely low.
